title: Principal Radiologist at Siemens Healthineers India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Siemens Healthineers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
